task_objective: Fix bundled Ludusavi shortcut artwork application and make artwork failures visible in backend logs.
design_decisions: Removed the ClearCustomArtworkForApp step because SetCustomArtworkForApp is expected to overwrite custom artwork cleanly and the shortcut may be newly created.
Threaded the existing frontend log RPC wrapper into the launcher and artwork helper so artwork start, success, and failure messages reach the Decky backend log.
Kept Ludusavi launch best-effort when artwork application fails.
results: Focused artwork/package tests and frontend typecheck passed. Frontend bundle and plugin zip were rebuilt after the TypeScript changes.
